welcome.title: NEXUS
welcome.subtitle: Personal Gaming Dashboard
welcome.description1: NEXUS is a dashboard that optimizes your PC for gaming. It provides unified management of hardware monitoring, process optimization, and network tuning.
welcome.description2: First, we'll scan your system and suggest optimal settings.

readiness.title: Readiness Summary
readiness.subtitle: Your PC's gaming readiness
readiness.noHardware: Hardware info unavailable. Score cannot be calculated.

complete.title: Setup Complete
complete.subtitle: NEXUS is ready
complete.description1: Optimal settings have been suggested based on the system scan results.
complete.description2: You can review and adjust details anytime from the dashboard.
